title: Pardon the Intrusion, You're in My Home!?
overview: Rinko's blissful otaku life is torn down when her two neighbors assign her as a chef and pretend-girlfriend.

title: Starting with a Pretend Boyfriend?!
overview: Satsuki is full of mystery... Usada and Rinko try to guess what his job is!

title: Meanwhile...?!
overview: A trio of newbie mangakas are introduced and Satsuki's secrets are finally revealed! Maybe?

title: I Don't Have Writer's Block, Okay?!
overview: Usada needs to write about love. But how could he, if he's never even had a crush before?

title: This Is a Work of Fiction, Okay?!
overview: Rinko and Satsuki need to put their fake relationship to the test with a fake date... But it feels so real?
